content.problemStatement:
While we took a fundamental approach to solving the previous problems, there are libraries in python which can help us achieve the same result. \
Some useful math [libraries](https://www.w3schools.com/python/module_math.asp) are covered here - these will be helpful for commonly found programming problems.
- math.sqrt(n) \
Returns the square root of a number $n$
- math.gcd(a,b) \
Returns the greatest common divisor of two integers $a$ and $b$
- math.floor(n) \
Rounds a number $n$ **down** to the nearest integer
- math.ceil(n) \
Rounds a number $n$ **up** to the nearest integer
- math.pow(x,y) \
Returns the value of $x$ to the power of $y$

**Note:** You have to **import** the math library before using these functions. \
Try running the code in the IDE without importing the library to check the error.
